{"agentId":"a3f5f1ba85fbc408b","agentType":"general-purpose","content":[{"text":"Good — `meta.json` has `"model": "opus"`, matching AC-2's expected result via the fallback chain. Now I have enough. Let me deliver the review.

## Verdict
**Approve with Concerns**

## Findings
- [CONCERN] `apps/rt/src/run/agent_prompt_render.rs:288` — `content.contains(alt)` is unanchored substring match. Pattern `T0\.(1|5)` expands to `["T0.1","T0.5"]`; a bullet like `- [ ] T0.15 …` will match `T0.1` and slip through. AC-3 passes only because the parent spec has no T0.10+. Use `starts_with` (after `[ ]` strip) or a boundary check before `T0.10+` tasks appear.
